name: @sergeant/openclaw-plugin
description: Sergeant OpenClaw Gateway plugin (Phase 0.5 PoC). Тонкий проксі-плагін, що реєструє Sergeant tools у OpenClaw runtime через HTTP-проксі до /api/internal/openclaw/*.

read.name: recall_memory
read.description: Top-k semantic recall з founder cofounder-namespace memory.

read.name: n8n_describe
read.description: Опис workflow: nodes, triggers, tier, approvalRequired.

read.name: refresh_business_snapshot
read.description: Меta-tool: фаєрить усі Tier A workflows паралельно.

write.name: create_github_issue
write.description: Створює GitHub issue. Gated approval flow (variant A/B/C — конфіг).

write.name: n8n_trigger
write.description: Тригерить workflow. Tier A auto / Tier C approval-gated; Tier B+D refused server-side.

write.name: n8n_activate
write.description: Активує/деактивує workflow. Always approval-gated (Tier A/C only).

hooks.llm_input: Per-call budget gate (cap $0.5 USD; fail-closed на server-error).
hooks.agent_turn_start: Опен invocation-row у openclaw_invocations + correlator agent_run_id ↔ id.
hooks.agent_turn_end: Фіналізує invocation з cost rollup + final status.
hooks.tool_call_pre: [Variant B] Approval flow: send DM → waitForCallback → set state.
hooks.tool_call_post: [Variant A/C] Audit log запис у openclaw_write_audit.

_notes: PR-B Phase 0.5 PoC manifest. Phase 1 (PR-C) додасть решту 12 read tools + 4 code/n8n/SEO tools + set_reminder + refresh_business_snapshot + 17 shortcuts.
Phase 4 (PR-D) розширить write tools tools до 7 і fixнe approval default за результатом цього PoC.
